scripts.deploy:dev: dotnet lambda deploy-function --function-name Flyingdarts-Backend-Stats-Api-Development  -frun dotnet6 -f net6.0 --region eu-west-1
scripts.deploy:prod: dotnet lambda deploy-function --function-name Flyingdarts-Backend-Stats-Api-Production  -frun dotnet6 -f net6.0 --region eu-west-1
